phases.name: analyze
phases.prompt: Read the existing Pocket Cinema React Native app. Write out/ANALYSIS.md describing its screens, components, data, and which parts are portable to a TV. Do not change app code yet.

phases.name: plan
phases.prompt: Audit the analyzed app and write out/TV_PORT_PLAN.md. The plan must cover the TV screen layout and how the remote control moves focus, selects, and goes back. Include a section titled ## Remote Control.

phases.name: build_test
phases.prompt: Produce a build preview and test the ported app. Write out/build/preview.txt with the build result and out/BUILD_TEST.md recording the Screenshot evidence and remote control checks (launch, move, select, back).
